title: Minimum Number of Days to Make m Bouquets
hints: First, check if it is even possible to make m bouquets given the total number of flowers and k. If not, return -1 immediately.
The answer lies within a specific range of days. Consider using binary search on the possible days to find the minimum valid day.
For a candidate day, count how many bouquets can be formed by grouping consecutive flowers that have bloomed by that day. Check if the count meets m.
